re_view0.24.0-alpha.1

In re_view::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels::aggregate

re_view::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels::aggregate

Function max

pub fn max<T>(
    array: &PrimitiveArray<T>,
) -> Option<<T as ArrowPrimitiveType>::Native>
where
    T: ArrowNumericType,
    <T as ArrowPrimitiveType>::Native: PartialOrd,
Expand description

Returns the maximum value in the array, according to the natural order. For floating point arrays any NaN values are considered to be greater than any other non-null value
